reasoning: Search results from ACEA (which dynamic sidebars index up to H1 2025) explicitly list battery-electric market share for April 2025 YTD at 15.3%, May 2025 YTD at 15.4%, and H1 2025 at 15.6%. Since Q1 was 15.2%, this implies the second quarter averaged slightly above 16% (with April around 15.6%, May around 15.8%, and June around 16.6%), remaining consistently far below the >20% threshold. Given that this calculation directly relies on official actual (or reliably projected YTD) figures up to May, exceeding 20% for Q2 mathematically requires an impossibly high BEV market share in June alone, which contradicts the H1 2025 figure of 15.6%. Therefore, it is basically certain that the market share did not exceed 20%.
